title: HomingStones
description: Use items to set homes and teleport back to them, a fun new twist to the classic set home!
body:
![Resource Header](https://norska.dev/resources/hs/resource_header.png)

**Quick overview:** HomingStones is a new and refreshing take on home / sethome plugins. Instead of using boring commands to interact with homes, HomingStones adds a new and interactive item to the game which players can place down in order to save their location and teleport back to it at a later time. The special homing stone takes a few seconds to activate after it has been placed down and transforms once it is ready, below you will find screenshots and animations.

## Features
### General
- Option to drop only if ripe & naturally grown.
- Drop via block (for mending) or spawn experience.
- Permissions to gain experience for each crop.
- Blacklist worlds where experience won't drop.

### Fully customizable homing stone items
- Create an infinite amount of custom homing stones (items.yml).
- Custom names, lores, flags, glow, custom heads, and custom item textures (1.14+).
- Define teleportation times, recipes, particle effects, and more for each item.
- Define cross-world teleportation rules [planned for future update].
- Prevent setting homes in territories (WorldGuard, Factions, Towny) [planned for future update].

### Quality of Life Features
- Easily give items to everyone online (using * in the command).
- Informative tab completion available for every command.
- Option to auto-discover recipes for players.
- Item drop confirmation prompt so that items are not easily lost.
- Item binding feature so that players cannot use foreign homing stones.
​

###  Norska Development Resource Quality
- Auto-updating configurations on plugin updates.
- Fully customizable messages including chat (option to auto-center), actionbars, and titles. (RGB Support)
- Fully customizable sounds (option for power and pitch), for every command and event.
- Use any PlaceholderAPI placeholder in plugin messages.

## Default configurations
- View the default config file [here](https://norska.dev/resources/hs/defaultconfig)!

## Developer API 
- Information about the available Developer API can be found [here](https://norska.dev/docs/free/hs/api)

*Notes: Folia is supported from version 2026.01 and later.
